creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Do you love Matcha? Check out this winter pop-up at DIFC! 

💚 @morematcha.ae is a cute and Instagrammable pop-up serving all-things-matcha; from matcha desserts to drinks! 

We had vanilla-matcha softy (30 AED). It has a good combination of creamy taste and bright matcha flavor. Huge serving, can be shared if you’re willing to. 😉

Tag a matcha-lover friend! 

#MoreMatcha #DIFC #DubaiPopUp #ladyandhersweetescapes #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger #travelblogger #pinayblogger #dubai #uae #DubaiReels #mydubai #visitdubai
